source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
<image_1> In the transition-state structure shown in the image, calculate the total number of bonds in the structure, including single, double, and triple bonds but excluding those involving hydrogen.

Note: Disregard arrows. Consider all components present in the transition-state structure shown in the image.
extraction_notes: image_1 is present as a PIL image object description, not a path or URL

image_dependency: 题干两次明确提到“shown in the image”，且要求基于过渡态结构进行计数
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明核心信息主要在图像中
需要识别结构中的化学键与组成部分，无法仅凭题干文字完成
multi_step: 需要先识别图中所有相关组成部分，再统计键的数量
题目要求同时处理 single、double、triple bonds，并排除涉及氢的键
还需忽略 arrows，属于带条件的计数任务，但总体仍是中等复杂度而非长链推理
verifiability: answer_type=number，目标答案形式清晰且便于核验
题目给出了明确计数规则：包含单/双/三键，排除涉及氢的键，忽略箭头

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像均已登记，核心语义资产仍然存在，可恢复性较强
该题对图像依赖很高，关键信息需要从过渡态结构中识别化学键后计数
存在 small_image_dimensions 风险，图像尺寸较小，可能影响结构细节辨识，因此不宜给高优先级
答案为明确数值型且计数规则清晰，后续仍具备人工或模型复核基础

Disregard arrows and consider all components present in the transition-state structure shown in the image.
normalization_notes: Removed the image placeholder token from the question text.
Preserved the image-dependent bond-counting task without adding structural details not present in the prompt.
Kept the answer as the original numeric value.
